events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary:** Grout placed without vent/bleed holes is a systemic installation defect per API RP 686 — the hollow/drummy sounding response confirms voids at the grout-to-baseplate interface, which will cause rocking, soft-foot, and anchor bolt overstress once the machine is loaded and vibrating. This is a **fail** at high risk: void extent needs to be mapped and verified (core drill/ultrasonic), defective grout chipped out, vent holes added, and the area regrouted and re-sounded before alignment/bolt torqueing proceeds.
